title: Process for producing a synthesis gas
abstract: Process for manufacturing a hydrogen-containing synthesis gas from a natural gas feedstock, comprising the conversion of said natural gas into a raw product gas and purification of said product gas, the process having a heat input provided by combustion of a fuel; said process comprises a step of conversion of a carbonaceous feedstock, and at least a portion of said fuel is a gaseous fuel obtained by said step of conversion of said carbonaceous feedstock, and the Wobbe Index of said fuel is increased by a step of carbon dioxide removal or methanation.
claims:
Claims 1 ) Process for manufacturing a hydrogen-containing synthesis gas (302) from a natural gas feedstock (301 ), comprising a stage of conversion (300) of said natural gas into a raw product gas (302) and purification of said raw product gas, said process having a heat input provided by combustion of a fuel, characterized in that said process comprises the production of a gaseous fuel and the combustion of said gaseous fuel to provide at least part of said heat input to the conversion stage, and said production of said gaseous fuel includes the steps of: a) gasification of a solid or liquid carbonaceous feedstock into a first gaseous product; b) a treatment of said first gaseous product to obtain said gaseous fuel, said treatment including at least one of: b1 ) a step of removal of carbon dioxide; b2) a step of methanation; and in that the upper Wobbe Index of said gaseous fuel is at least 14 MJ/Nm 3 . 2) Process according to claim 1 , wherein said step b1 ) of removal of carbon dioxide removes carbon dioxide with a purity of at least 90% molar, preferably at least 95%, more preferably at least 98%. 3) Process according to claim 1 or 2, wherein said step b1 ) of removal of carbon dioxide removes a fraction of the carbon dioxide content of the processed gas which is not greater than 90%, preferably not greater than 

 75%, leaving a corresponding residual carbon dioxide in said gaseous fuel. 4) Process according to any of claims 1 to 3, wherein said step b1 ) is carried out by means of adsorption of carbon dioxide on a regenerable solid adsorbent, preferably of the pressure swing adsorption type 5) Process according to any of claims 1 to 4, said step b2) of methanation (430) being carried out after said step b1 ) of removal of carbon dioxide. 6) Process according to claim 5, comprising a heat recovery from said step b2) of methanation by generation of steam. 7) Process according to any of claims 1 to 6, wherein the upper Wobbe Index of said gaseous fuel is at least 19 MJ/Nm 3 , preferably at least 24 MJ/Nm 3 . 8) Process according to any of the previous claims, said step a) of gasification being carried out in a fluidized bed. 9) Process according to claim 8, wherein the ash and/or fine particulate matter produced during said step a) of gasification is subject to a further combustion in a separate boiler, preferably a circulating fluid bed coal boiler. 10) Process according to claim 9, wherein said separate boiler produces steam and said steam is used in said step a) and/or in said conversion stage of natural gas and/or in said purification of said raw product gas. 1 1 ) A process according to any of claims 8 to 10, wherein said step a) of gasification comprises the use of moderator of the gasification temperature and said moderator is other than water, for example nitrogen. 

 12) A process according to claim 1 1 , wherein said moderator is nitrogen, and the moderator is admitted to the gasification process either: i) by means of a dedicated feed of nitrogen, or ii) together with oxygen by means of a feed of air or oxygen-enriched air. 13) Process according to claim 1 , wherein the treatment b) also includes: i) a step of catalytic hydrolysis of the carbonyl sulfide (COS), producing a gas with a reduced content of carbonyl sulfide and an increased content of hydrogen sulfide (H 2 S), and ii) a step of H 2 S separation by means of a wash with a liquid solution with affinity to capture H 2 S, preferably an MDEA wash selective for H 2 S over CO 2 , that produces a sour H 2 S-rich stream and a gas stream with reduced H 2 S content, and iii) feeding the gas stream with reduced H 2 S content to any of step b1 or step b2. 14) Process according to any of the previous claims, wherein said carbonaceous feedstock comprises at least one of coal, lignite, coal- derived coke, petroleum coke or heavy fuel oil, and said step of conversion into gaseous fuel is a gasification process. 15) A plant for the production of a hydrogen-containing synthesis gas from a natural gas feedstock, comprising a section for the conversion of said natural gas into a raw product gas, at least one fired device (200-204) producing heat, a fuel line (35a) directed to said fired device(s), and a purification section fed with said raw product gas; characterized in that it comprises a gasifier (1 12) fed with a solid or liquid carbonaceous feedstock (21 ) and in that said gasifier provides at least part of the fuel directed to said at least one fired device, 

 and in that said plant comprises a section for treatment of a product gas delivered by said gasifier, said section being arranged to increase the upper Wobbe Index of said gaseous fuel to at least 14 MJ/Nm 3 and including at least one of: a carbon dioxide removal unit; a methanator. 16) A plant according to claim 15 wherein the carbon dioxide removal unit is a carbon dioxide adsorption unit made up of at least one vessel containing a regenerable carbon dioxide adsorbent, for example a pressure swing adsorption unit. 17) A plant according to claim 16, including also a boiler, preferably a coal- fired circulating fluid bed boiler, and wherein ash and/or fine particulate matter discharged from said gasifier (1 12) is fed to said boiler for further combustion. 18) A plant according to claim 16 or 17, wherein said gasifier is a fluidized bed gasifier and uses a moderator other than water to moderate the gasification temperature. 19) A method for revamping a plant for the production of a hydrogen- containing synthesis gas, said plant comprising a conversion section, at least one fired device producing heat for said conversion section and a fuel line being directed to said fired device; said plant being fed with a natural gas feedstock and said natural gas feedstock being split into a first fraction used as process gas in the conversion section and a second fraction used as fuel and directed to said fired-device; said method being characterized in that : 

 a gasifier of a solid or liquid carbonaceous feedstock is added to said plant; said gasifier is arranged to produce at least part of said fuel directed to said fired device, replacing a corresponding part of said second fraction of natural gas, a section for treatment of a product gas delivered by said gasifier is also installed, in order to increase the upper Wobbe Index of said fuel to at least 14 MJ/Nm 3 , said section including at least one of a carbon dioxide removal unit and a methanator, said carbon dioxide removal unit being preferably a carbon dioxide adsorption unit made up of at least one vessel of regenerable carbon dioxide adsorbent, for example a pressure swing adsorption unit, optionally, further comprising the installation of a coal-fired boiler for combustion of ash and/or particulate matter of said gasifier.
